name: Byline Bancorp, Inc.
description: Byline Bancorp, Inc. operates as the bank holding company for Byline Bank, providing a range of banking products and services to small and medium-sized businesses, commercial real estate sponsors, and consumers in the United States. It offers non-interest bearing accounts, interest-bearing checking accounts, savings accounts, money market accounts, and time deposits. The company also provides commercial real estate loans, commercial and industrial loans, small business administration loans, consumer loans, and online and mobile banking services.
